# 💡 C89 · The Octahedral Gap
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The tetrahedra's intersection (volume 1/6 of the cube) is the geometric locus of the conditional-independence bound; the gap is β is the octahedron — three readings of one thing. Active (30% · Run 5).
